overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character moves from a covered plaza past industrial elements, onto a busy street lined with palm trees and digital billboards, crosses a traffic intersection, and continues along a commercial sidewalk with cafes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with large advertisement billboard and industrial HVAC equipment

events.description: turns left to exit the covered plaza onto the main street

agents.ego_description: walking through the concrete plaza toward the street exit, passing industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: person standing near the wall looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement showing a woman in purple jacket with 16 FL OZ text
green neon corporate signage mounted on the building facade
large rectangular air conditioning units with vent grilles
low concrete seating structures with wooden tops
closed corrugated metal shutters on storefronts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered concrete plaza dominated by a massive digital billboard advertising a beverage. Industrial HVAC units line the left side while a lone NPC stands near the wall. The camera walks forward through the plaza and turns left to exit onto the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown commercial street with palm trees and moving traffic

events.description: exits the covered plaza onto the open street with palm trees and neon buildings
cars with headlights on drive past on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the neon-lit cityscape and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving down the street with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the street between sidewalk and road
multi-story buildings covered in glowing neon advertisements and signage
multi-lane road with red curbs and moving vehicle traffic
commercial shop windows with neon interior lighting and displays
multiple large electronic screens showing advertisements high on buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a bustling downtown street lined with palm trees and towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The sidewalk runs parallel to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the camera proceeds down the street, passing commercial storefronts with glowing windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes and traffic signals

events.description: approaches crosswalk and stops at the intersection edge
silver car drives across the crosswalk from left to right
resumes walking to cross the intersection after the car passes

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then crossing the wide intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan crossing the intersection through the crosswalk area
group of pedestrians walking on the opposite sidewalk approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
open paved area where multiple streets meet with traffic bollards
tall pole with illuminated traffic lights and pedestrian signals
buildings on the far side of the intersection with lit signage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide urban intersection marked with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. After stopping to allow a silver car to pass, the camera crosses the open intersection area. The surrounding buildings feature bright neon advertisements, and pedestrians are visible on the approaching opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with cafes and closed storefronts

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and passes the KUTSUROGI CAFE entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in pink clothing, passing various storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman in pink outfit walking ahead at a steady pace along the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated sign with green OPEN neon and red KUTSUROGI CAFE lettering
bright orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street edge
corrugated metal security shutters pulled down over closed shops

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing the KUTSUROGI CAFE with its green neon OPEN sign. Orange safety railings line the street edge, and the camera follows a woman in a pink outfit walking ahead. The street features a mix of open businesses and closed storefronts with metal shutters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded industrial plaza into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a bustling downtown district. It begins within a semi-covered concrete area dominated by a massive beverage billboard and HVAC units, moving forward before turning left to exit the plaza. As the camera emerges onto the main street, the environment opens up into a wide urban corridor lined with palm trees, towering neon advertisements, and a steady flow of traffic and pedestrians. The scene then shifts toward a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes, pausing briefly for a silver car before crossing into the open street. Finally, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing the green neon sign of the Kutsurogi Cafe and orange safety railings while following a woman in a pink outfit past a mix of open businesses and shuttered storefronts.
